# Ganapathi Ramkumar Palanivelu — AI Architect Portfolio

> Senior AI Architect, Enterprise Architect, and Principal Technology Leader. Creator of RamVector AI Document Intelligence app.

## About

Ganapathi Ramkumar Palanivelu is a Senior AI and Enterprise Architect with 14+ years of experience designing production-grade GenAI systems, RAG pipelines, multi-agent AI, TOGAF-aligned architectures, and multi-cloud platforms on Azure and AWS.

## Product: RamVector

RamVector is a full-stack AI document intelligence application available on the Apple App Store and Google Play. Built on a RAG architecture with FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, RabbitMQ, and multi-LLM support (GPT-4, Groq, Ollama).

### Key Features
- PDF document upload and AI analysis
- RAG pipeline with semantic chunking and vector search
- Multi-LLM support: GPT-4, Groq, Ollama
- AI-generated summaries and action items
- Enterprise workflow recommendations
- Privacy-first — documents processed transiently

### App Store
- iOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/ramvector/id6763949988
